Actions.Text: REFERRED TO LIBRARIES AND EDUCATION TECHNOLOGY
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LIBRARIES AND EDUCATION TECHNOLOGY

Title: Enacts the facilitating access to e-books for libraries act
Summary: Permits libraries and library systems to enter into cooperative purchasing agreements to purchase or license electronic literary materials; prevents contracts with libraries and library systems from restricting the disclosure of such contract's terms.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to the facilitating access to e-books for libraries act
